overall.description: A cinematic first-person walk through a rain-soaked parking lot or vehicle staging area at night. The camera moves steadily forward past construction barriers under the glow of sodium street lights, with heavy rain creating reflections on the wet asphalt and reducing visibility through mist.

scene_state.functional_zone: rain-soaked parking lot with concrete construction barriers

agents.ego_description: walking steadily forward through the wet parking lot alongside concrete barriers, maintaining a consistent pace in the heavy rain

entered.detail: Red and white striped concrete construction barriers lining the left side of the path
Tall street light pole with dual sodium vapor lamps illuminating the scene with warm yellow light
Rain-soaked asphalt surface with visible puddles reflecting the street lights
Faint lights from distant buildings or infrastructure visible through the rain and fog

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a dark, stormy night in a wide, empty parking lot. The camera moves forward past red and white concrete barriers on the left, illuminated by the warm glow of overhead street lights. Heavy rain creates glistening reflections on the wet asphalt while distant lights pierce through the misty atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: parking lot transition zone with metal construction barriers

events.description: concrete barriers transition to metal checkered barriers on the left side

agents.ego_description: continuing to walk forward along the barrier-lined path as the construction barrier type changes

entered.detail: Metal construction barriers with black and white checkered patterns and red reflective strips
Large structure with bright interior lights becoming visible in the distance through the rain

segments.scene_description: As the camera progresses, the concrete barriers give way to metal barricades with distinctive checkered patterns. The path continues through the rain-slicked parking lot, with a brightly lit terminal building gradually emerging from the fog ahead. Sparse grass patches appear near the barrier bases.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching terminal checkpoint or ferry terminal

agents.ego_description: walking toward the illuminated terminal structure at the end of the barrier-lined path

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches the brightly lit terminal structure, which dominates the center of the frame as the destination of the path. The metal barriers continue lining the left side while the wet asphalt reflects the increasing light from the terminal. Heavy rain continues to fall, creating a hazy atmosphere around the illuminated building.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement through a rain-soaked parking lot that transitions from a dark, desolate expanse into the bright glow of a terminal building. It begins by gliding past red and white concrete barriers under the warm light of overhead street lamps, with heavy rain creating glistening reflections on the wet asphalt. As the camera progresses, the concrete barriers shift into metal barricades with checkered patterns, and the surrounding mist begins to reveal a brightly lit structure in the distance. The scene then expands as the camera approaches the terminal building, which gradually dominates the frame and casts an increasing light across the slick ground. Finally, the path culminates at the illuminated building, with the heavy rain creating a hazy, atmospheric veil around the destination.
